text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're looking pretty miserable. Did you<n>goof
something up again?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I've been trying so hard not to,<n>but it
never seems to work...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've wanted to say this for a while, but<n>can't you
think through your problems<n>logically?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If we identify the nature of your<n>blunders and
then run the numbers, we<n>should be able to come
up with a fix.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, really? Well... let's see what<n>goof-ups I did
recently...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I fumbled with the seasonings when I wascooking and spilled all of them into thepot...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
An insufficient static friction<n>coefficient—put a
non-slip pad under<n>everything.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I slipped on a banana peel, and then as<n>soon as I
got up, I slipped on the same<n>peel again...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hm, a continuity problem. Find the<n>pattern and
you'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And one time during class, I was trying<n>to pick up
a pen I dropped, but I fell<n>down and took the
whole desk with me...<n>Even the chair fell over on
my head...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... I don't think my calculations canaccount for that one. I'll have toreevaluate the magnitude of the goof-upfactor...
